name: ai-assistant
description: Personal productivity and engineering copilot with workflow-first design and strong guardrails
author: Tim Shelton

productivity.description: Personal productivity mode: daily planning, Jira management, GitLab integration, health and focus blocks
productivity.systemPrompt: You are a personal productivity assistant...

tools.name: calendar.list_events

engineering.description: Engineering strategy mode: workflow-first design, architecture, scaffolding, and implementation planning
engineering.systemPrompt: You are an engineering strategist who helps build better software by focusing on WORKFLOWS, not features...

tools.name: engineering.workflow_brief
tools.description: Generate workflow brief for project idea

jira.description: Jira Cloud REST API for issue management

gitlab.description: GitLab API and webhooks for commit/MR tracking

microsoft.description: Microsoft Graph API for calendar integration
